case_title: BRIZEE, ERIC H. VS CHIN, SING

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL TO ERIC H. BRIZEE RETURNED SIGNED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, SING
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIZEE, ERIC H. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHIN, SING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CHIN, SING RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BRIZEE, ERIC H. $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $120.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF BRIZEE, ERIC H.
